name_es: White Pool Party — Hotel Santa Clara
name_en: White Pool Party — Hotel Santa Clara
description: Pool party de etiqueta blanca con DJ internacional, coctelería de autor y dress code total white. En la piscina del hotel colonial más icónico de Cartagena.
description_en: All-white dress code pool party with international DJ, craft cocktails, at the pool of Cartagena's most iconic colonial hotel.
title: White Pool Party — Hotel Santa Clara
